key_points: Mobile app development is on schedule

decisions: Mobile app development is on schedule.

action_items.task: Conduct additional testing for the payment module

stage3.summary: The meeting confirmed that the mobile app development is on schedule and that the login feature has been successfully completed. However, it was noted that the payment module requires additional testing.
action_list: Conduct additional testing for the payment module - Owner: Emma

follow_up_email.subject: Meeting Summary and Action Items
follow_up_email.body:
Dear Team,

Thank you for joining the meeting today. We confirmed that the mobile app development is on schedule and the login feature has been completed. However, we need to conduct additional testing for the payment module. Emma will be responsible for this task.

Please keep this in mind as we move forward. If you have any questions or need further clarification, feel free to reach out.

Best,
[Your Name]
